sentences.text: Many flowers grew in order, so there were always nice things to see and smell.
Little Hans had many friends, but big Hugh the Miller was the best.
The Miller loved Hans and often took flowers or fruit from his garden.
The Miller said, 'Real friends share everything,' and Hans felt proud.
